export const docToUser = (doc: UserDoc): AdapterUser => ({
  ...doc,
  id: doc.id.id.toString(),
  emailVerified:
    typeof doc?.emailVerified === "string"
      ? new Date(Date.parse(doc.emailVerified))
      : (doc?.emailVerified ?? null),
})

return (
)

return (

Premium Widget

{inventory.count} in stock

Price: ${inventory.price}

)

return {
  file,
  methodName: searchParams.get('methodName') ?? '<unknown>',
  line: parseInt(searchParams.get('line1') ?? '0', 10) || undefined,
  column: parseInt(searchParams.get('column1') ?? '0', 10) || undefined,
  isServer: searchParams.get('isServer') === 'true',
}

let __nextDevClientId =
  typeof window !== 'undefined'
    ? Math.round(Math.random() * 100 + Date.now())
    : 0

const statusDotColor: Record<Status, string> = {
  [Status.None]: '',
  [Status.Compiling]: '#f5a623',
  [Status.Rendering]: '#50e3c2',
  [Status.RenderingColdCache]: '#f5a623',
  [Status.RenderingCacheDisabled]: '#f5a623',
}

const location =
    frame.file && frame.line1
      ? `${frame.file}:${frame.line1}${frame.column1 ? `:${frame.column1}` : ''}`
      : frame.file || '<unknown>'

return {
  nextFile: `${NEXT_PACKAGES}/next`,
  nextMdxFile: `${NEXT_PACKAGES}/next-mdx`,
  nextEnvFile: `${NEXT_PACKAGES}/next-env`,
  nextBaFile: `${NEXT_PACKAGES}/next-bundle-analyzer`,
  nextSwcFile: `${NEXT_PACKAGES}/next-swc`,
}
